description_long: This restaurant features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and large open front, allowing visibility into the dining area. The interior is furnished with rows of tables and chairs, and there are potted plants adding greenery to the space. The exterior is defined by a combination of white and black structural elements, with wood-textured flooring visible inside and at the entrance. The open facade is supported by thick columns, and the layout suggests a spacious, airy dining environment. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, providing privacy and structural support. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and inviting, suitable for an urban commercial setting.
description: A modern restaurant with an open front, visible dining area, and a mix of white, black, and wood textures. The design is boxy and contemporary with prominent columns and potted plants.
description_view_0: The open front reveals the dining area with tables, chairs, and potted plants, framed by thick white columns and a wood-textured floor.
description_view_1: Side view showing the entrance area, additional greenery, and the transition from exterior to interior spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a solid roof and back wall, with minimal openings and no visible interior details.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle highlighting the solid black and white exterior walls and a glimpse of the entrance area with plants.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is characterized by a wide, open front framed by thick white columns and a flat roof, creating a welcoming and airy entrance. The use of black and white structural elements contrasts with the warm wood-textured flooring visible inside. Minimal ornamentation and clean lines give the exterior a sleek, modern appearance.
